messages.content:
我要写IEEEbiography，你帮我翻译成英文：
朱东升在2023年毕业于复旦大学，硕士学位，目前在上海人工智能实验室担任研究员。研究兴趣包括大语言模型的训练、评测以及在智能体中的相关应用，长期在相关领域的顶会顶刊上担任审稿人。

Dongsheng Zhu received the M.S. degree from Fudan University in 2023. He is currently a Researcher at the Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory. His research interests include the training and evaluation of large language models and their applications in intelligent agents. He has long served as a reviewer for top conferences and journals in related fields.
